title: Company Search

error.invalidUrl: Please enter a valid HTTP/HTTPS URL.

previewError.loadFailed: Could not load preview. The website might block embedding or is unavailable.
previewError.enterValidUrl: Enter a valid HTTP/HTTPS URL to preview.

discoveryModal.previewPlaceholder: Enter a valid URL above to see a preview.
discoveryModal.configDescription: Define specific CSS selectors and extraction rules for this website. Changes here will affect the current discovery attempt.

googleRedirectModal.title: Find on Google
googleRedirectModal.description: We couldn't find a direct match for '{{query}}'. You can try searching on Google to find the company's official website.
websiteFilter.label: Only show companies with a valid website (HTTPS)
googleRedirectModal.pasteUrlLabel: Or paste Google search result URL here:
googleRedirectModal.urlHelpText: You can paste either the Google search URL or the direct company website URL if you found it.
websiteFilter.ariaLabel: Filter companies by valid HTTPS website
googleRedirectModal.step1.description: We couldn't find a direct match for '{{query}}'. Use the button below to search on Google and find the company's official website.
googleRedirectModal.step2.title: Step 2: Submit the URL
googleRedirectModal.step2.description: Once you find the correct website, paste its URL below to proceed. You can also paste the Google search results page URL.
googleRedirectModal.step1.title: Step 1: Search on Google
googleRedirectModal.tip: Tip: Look for the official company website in search results
googleRedirectModal.step1.instructions: Search Google for the company's official website:
googleRedirectModal.example: Example of a good URL: https://www.microsoft.com
googleRedirectModal.helpText: Can't find it? Try different search keywords
googleRedirectModal.example2: Should match the company domain (e.g., https://microsoft.com)
googleRedirectModal.example3: Google search URLs are also acceptable
googleRedirectModal.invalidUrl: Please enter a valid URL including http:// or https://
